Items.Title: Football Daily
Items.Description: David Villa on Spain, Messi and winning the World Cup.

Items.Title: Today’s Papers – Leao’s price tag, Spalletti pushes for more Juventus signings
Items.Description: La Gazzetta dello SportWhat a Spain! Messi, it’s your turnAustria crushed 3-0, the queen of Europe to the Roud of 16. At midnight, Messi (and Lautaro) for more records.Batistuta: ‘Argentina, hunger and smiles. On the contrary, I didn’t have fun.’Milan sell him for at least 60mLeao, there’s the priceRafa gets closer to the farewell. The club is even open to a loan deal with an option to buy.Inter’s agreement with Khalaili, Juve: Kolo for the pre-seasonCorriere dello SportScary Spain, enjoy MessiJuventus market: Spalletti in a hurryLucio would like to have the goalkeeper and the striker right awayDibu and Kolo within half July, Muharemovic is closerAgreement with PSG for Kolo Muani close. If Martinez moves to Turin, Aston Villa could get Parma’s Suzuki. Carnevali in talks with ‘his’ Sassuolo for the Bosnian defender.Inter, yes from Khalaili and ProvedelRoma: Dybala’s signature isn’t hereThe club offers a one-year deal: Paulo expected more and is making assessmentsAllegri to Napoli, waiting for the tweetDe Laurentiis considers a big presentation at the San Carlo theatre on Tuesday, the 14th.Anderson, City coup: 135mTuttosportYildiz signs MuharemovicMilan fed up, 60m and goodbye Leao

Items.Description:
